message:
test(proptest): add property tests for canary_rehearsal and cutover_evidence

- proptest_canary_rehearsal: 28 tests covering DrillType serde, cohort invariants,
  drill step counting, disruption budget enforcement, rollback triggers, report counters
- proptest_cutover_evidence: 32 tests covering PrerequisiteGate, RegressionGuardSuite,
  TestGateSummary, BenchmarkSummary, IncidentRegistry, RiskRegistry, GoNoGoChecklist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
